title: leucas montana f. wightii
intro: Leucas montana f. wightii, also known as Wight's Leucas, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is widely distributed in the Himalayan regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Leucas montana f. wightii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, to treat various ailments, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and skin conditions.
